label: Compile and Run C
command: if [[ $ZED_FILE == *.c ]]; then mkdir -p ./output && time gcc "$ZED_FILE" -o "./output/$ZED_STEM" && "./output/$ZED_STEM"; else echo 'Not a C file'; fi

label: Run python
command: if [[ $ZED_FILE == *.py ]]; then mkdir -p ./output && python3 "$ZED_FILE"; else echo 'Not a Python file'; fi

label: Run rust
command: if [[ $ZED_FILE == *.rs ]]; then mkdir -p ./output && rustc "$ZED_FILE" -o "./output/$ZED_STEM" && "./output/$ZED_STEM"; else echo 'Not a Rust file'; fi
